mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE date(create_time) in #{item}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM courses WHERE date(create_time) in #{item}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignments WHERE date(create_time) in #{item}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM questions WHERE date(create_time) in #{item}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_learning_records WHERE date(create_time) in #{item}

select us.username from users us left join user_learning_records ulr on us.id = ulr.user_id where ulr.create_time >= #{startDate} and ulr.create_time <= #{endDate} group by us.id order by count(ulr.id) desc limit #{topN}

select us.username from users us left join user_action_logs ual on us.id = ual.user_id where ual.create_time >= #{startDate} and ual.create_time <= #{endDate} group by us.id order by count(ual.id) desc limit #{topN}

select us.username from users us left join answers al on us.id = al.user_id where al.create_time >= #{startDate} and al.create_time <= #{endDate} group by us.id order by count(al.id) desc limit #{topN}

select us.username from users us left join user_courses ucs on us.id = ucs.user_id where ucs.join_time >= #{startDate} and ucs.join_time <= #{endDate} group by us.id order by count(ucs.id) desc limit #{topN}
select us.username from users us left join questions d on us.id = d.user_id where d.create_time >= #{startDate} and d.create_time <= #{endDate} group by us.id order by count(d.id) desc limit #{topN}
select us.username from users us left join courses c on us.id = c.teacher_id where c.create_time >= #{startDate} and c.create_time <= #{endDate} group by us.id order by count(c.id) desc limit #{topN}
